india_trends.title: UAE exit from OPEC could be net positive for India: Sagar Adani
india_trends.summary: Sagar Adani sees a UAE move away from OPEC as beneficial for India. He stressed energy's importance for economic strength. India needs to greatly increase its energy capacity. A mix of energy sources is crucial for stable power. Electrification and reduced energy imports will boost India's economy.

india_trends.title: AI stock Blue Cloud jumps after this MoU update. Check details
india_trends.summary: Blue Cloud Softech share price has gained over 2% in one month and rallied 8% in three months. The smallcap stock has plunged 32% in six months, while it has gained 15% in one year. Blue Cloud Softech shares have declined 52% in three years.

india_trends.title: China stays on top, India slips 3 spots: How the West Asia war changed EM ranks
india_trends.summary: With crude above $100 and capital flows turning volatile, the West Asia shock is now playing out through financial channels. Emerging market rankings are shifting, driven by external resilience rather than growth.

india_trends.title: Indians bet on gold, not on the necklace glitter for the first time
india_trends.summary: For the first time, India's investment demand for gold surpassed jewellery consumption in the March quarter, reaching 82 metric tons compared to 66 tons for jewellery. This shift, driven by subdued equity market returns and rising gold prices, saw investment demand account for 54.3% of total consump

india_trends.title: Federal Reserve at Crossroads: Leadership shift & policy outlook
india_trends.summary: Fed faces leadership shift as Kevin Warsh promotes open debate. Policymakers remain divided on inflation and rates, with no near-term cuts expected. Labor market steady; inflation risks persist.

india_trends.title: Canara HSBC Life Insurance shares soar 10% as Q4 net profit rises 9% to Rs 35 crore
india_trends.summary: Canara HSBC Life Insurance shares surged 10% after reporting a nearly 9% net profit increase to Rs 35 crore for Q4 FY26. The insurer saw a 13% rise in Annualised Premium Equivalent (APE) and a significant 49% surge in Value of New Business (VNB) to Rs 214 crore, with VNB margins expanding to 30.4%.

india_trends.title: Emmvee Photovoltaic hits 52-week high as strong FY26 results fuel rally
india_trends.summary: The stock has hit its upper circuit band of ₹299.50, with sell-side pressure outweighing buyers — 56.16% of order quantity sitting on the sell side against 43.84% on the buy side.

india_trends.title: Bandhan Bank shares surge 11% after Q4 profit spikes 68% YoY to Rs 534 crore
india_trends.summary: Bandhan Bank shares jumped after strong Q4FY26 results, with net profit rising 68% YoY to Rs 534 crore. The surge was driven by lower provisions and improved asset quality, as gross NPAs declined to 3.27%.
